---
title: "Side Projects"
toc: false
---

::: {.section-label}
Open-source teaching materials, tools, and experiments — all publicly available on GitHub
:::

## Teaching materials

::: {.grid .mt-3}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[PhD Lecture]{.project-tag}
[Python]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
Earnings Management Then and Now: Revisiting Jones (1991)
:::

::: {.project-desc}
An interactive PhD lecture walking through the seminal Jones (1991) model, its evolution, and modern applications. Designed for doctoral students in accounting and finance.
:::

[Visit Site {{< fa arrow-right >}}](https://caspardp.github.io/phd-lecture-dec/){.project-link}
[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/phd-lecture-dec){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[MSc Course]{.project-tag}
[R]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
Data Analytics for Finance
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Public-facing course materials for the MSc Data Analytics for Finance course at RSM. Covers data wrangling, visualization, and applied econometrics.
:::

[Visit Site {{< fa arrow-right >}}](https://caspardp.github.io/rsm-data-analytics-for-finance-public/){.project-link}
[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/rsm-data-analytics-for-finance-public){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[BSc Course]{.project-tag}
[Quarto]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
BSc Advanced Research Methods
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Course site for the BSc Advanced Research Methods module at RSM. Slides, exercises, and worked examples.
:::

[Visit Site {{< fa arrow-right >}}](https://caspardp.github.io/bsc-arm/){.project-link}
[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/bsc-arm){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[MSc Course]{.project-tag}
[Dashboard]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
MSc AI Dashboard
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Interactive dashboard based on a pipeline to download, parse, score, and descriptively explore MSc accounting theses for signs of AI-generated text. The design uses the ChatGPT launch (November 2022) as a soft pre/post cutoff. The idea is to document the diffusion of new technology and student responses to it in a transparent way. Experimental — may contain errors.
:::

[Visit Site {{< fa arrow-right >}}](https://caspardp.github.io/msc-ai-dashboard/){.project-link}
[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/msc-ai-dashboard){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[BSc / MSc]{.project-tag}
[Interactive]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
Interactive Learning: Financial Statement Analysis
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Interactive exercises and self-assessment tools for financial statement analysis. Experimental — may contain errors.
:::

[Visit Site {{< fa arrow-right >}}](https://caspardp.github.io/interactive_learning_repo/){.project-link}
[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/interactive_learning_repo){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Teaching]{.project-tag}
[Python]{.project-tag}
[Stata]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
Jupyter + Stata Teaching Environment
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Docker-based setup combining Jupyter Lab, Stata, and NBGrader for interactive assignments and reproducible teaching workflows.
:::

[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/jupyter-stata-environment){.project-link}
:::
:::

:::

## Research tools & data

::: {.grid .mt-3}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Research]{.project-tag}
[Python]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
SEC Gazette: Structured Data from Historical Filings
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Extracts structured data from old SEC gazette-style filings using OCR and parsing pipelines. Useful for historical accounting research.
:::

[Visit Site {{< fa arrow-right >}}](https://caspardp.github.io/sec-gazette/){.project-link}
[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/sec-gazette){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Dataset]{.project-tag}
[R]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
LCV Congressional Scorecard (1971–2024)
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Clean, analysis-ready dataset of the League of Conservation Voters Congressional Scorecard covering over 50 years of environmental voting records.
:::

[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/lcv){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Research]{.project-tag}
[Python]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
cite-hustle: literature collection pipeline
:::

::: {.project-desc}
A research-automation tool that collects paper metadata across top accounting, finance, and economics journals, enriches abstracts from SSRN and OpenAlex, and stores them in a searchable DuckDB database. Experimental — may contain errors.
:::

[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/cite-hustle){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Research]{.project-tag}
[R]{.project-tag}
[Fork]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
RFirmMatch: Matching Firm Names to Databases
:::

::: {.project-desc}
R functions for fuzzy-matching company names across accounting and finance databases (Compustat, CRSP, etc.).

*Forked from [MatthiasUckert/RFirmMatch](https://github.com/MatthiasUckert/RFirmMatch)*
:::

[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/RFirmMatch){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Dataset]{.project-tag}
[R]{.project-tag}
[Fork]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
Bundestag Historical Constituency Data
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Historical German federal election results at the constituency level, cleaned and structured for panel data analysis.

*Forked from [ZeitOnline/bundestagswahl-historische-wahlkreis-daten](https://github.com/ZeitOnline/bundestagswahl-historische-wahlkreis-daten)*
:::

[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/bundestagswahl-historische-wahlkreis-daten){.project-link}
:::
:::

:::

## Tools & utilities

::: {.grid .mt-3}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Tool]{.project-tag}
[Python]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
pdfgrabba
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Command-line tool that grabs PDFs from URLs or lists and saves them to a local folder. Useful for bulk literature downloads.
:::

[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/pdfgrabba){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Tool]{.project-tag}
[Python]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
reviewer2
:::

::: {.project-desc}
reviewer2 is a fork of the open-source pipeline behind isitcredible.com by The Catalogue of Errors Ltd. The original design and all prompt engineering are their work. This fork replaces the hard Google Gemini dependency with a provider-agnostic backend built on the OpenAI SDK, so the same pipeline can run against Ollama Cloud, OpenAI, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
:::

[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/reviewer2){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.project-card}
[Tool]{.project-tag}
[Python]{.project-tag}

::: {.project-title}
Text to Respondus
:::

::: {.project-desc}
Command-line tool that converts plain-text quiz files into Respondus-compatible CSV for import into learning management systems such as ANS. Detects correct answers, preserves feedback, and supports batch conversion.
:::

[Source {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP/text-to-respondus){.project-link}
:::
:::

:::

::: {.section-label .mt-4}
[Browse all repos on GitHub {{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/CasparDP?tab=repositories)
:::
